qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont oi_factor_cont, ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.c_factor_cont c_factor_cont, ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.d_factor_cont d_factor_cont FROM ACC05_FACTOR_CONT ORDER BY ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.FactoresContribuyentes.FACTOR_CONT\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont oi_factor_cont FROM ACC05_FACTOR_CONT ORDER BY ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.FactoresContribuyentes.FACTOR_CONT\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.FactoresContribuyentes.FACTOR_CONT.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.FactoresContribuyentes.FACTOR_CONT.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont) as CNT from ACC05_FACTOR_CONT Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.oi_factor_cont={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.d_factor_cont,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC05_FACTOR_CONT.c_factor_cont,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
